chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3087 of 2024 CP D 3661 of 2018 CP D 4428 of 2018 CP D 7612 of 2018 CP D 1389 of 2019 CP D 4885 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of Misc. No.13776/2024 3. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Mr. Haider Waheed, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 3087 of 2024; 3661, 4428 and 7612 of 2018; 1389 of 2019 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 4885 of 2020 Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate for respondent Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Nadir Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that these petitions assail show cause notices, however, the petitioners would not press these petitions and respond to the show cause notice/s before the issuing authority. It is further sought that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity to petitioners to be heard, and pending adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for respondents / department has no cavil in such regard and states that the petitions be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
